expectations.text: Response generates Organization JSON-LD with sameAs array
expectations.evidence: Organization schema includes sameAs array with Twitter, LinkedIn, and GitHub URLs. Both the standalone JSON example and the code in __root.tsx include sameAs.

expectations.text: Response generates WebSite JSON-LD with SearchAction
expectations.evidence: WebSite schema includes potentialAction with @type SearchAction, target with EntryPoint and urlTemplate, and query-input. Present in both JSON examples and code.

All URLs use absolute format: https://buildstack.dev, https://buildstack.dev/images/logo.svg, https://buildstack.dev/search?q={search_term_string}. Explicitly notes 'logo URL must be absolute, not relative'.

expectations.text: Response shows integration in TanStack Start root layout
expectations.evidence: Shows two integration approaches in src/routes/__root.tsx: Option A uses head() function with scripts array, Option B uses a JsonLd component. Both use createRootRoute and Outlet from @tanstack/react-router.
